photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

isAdmin.description: Whether the user has administrative privileges.

username.description: The name of the user who submitted the feedback.

message.description: The feedback message from the user.

sentiment.description: The AI-analyzed sentiment of the message.

createdAt.description: The server timestamp when the feedback was created.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: A user-submitted review for a product or service.

userId.description: The UID of the user who wrote the review.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

userPhotoURL.description: URL of the user's profile photo.

text.description: The main content of the review.

createdAt.description: Server timestamp of when the review was created.

updatedAt.description: Server timestamp of the last update.

status.description: The moderation status of the review.

/feedback/{feedbackId}.description: Stores individual feedback entries submitted by users.

/reviews/{reviewId}.description: Stores user-submitted reviews. Each user can only have one review per product, identified by their UID as the document ID.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public profile information for users.
